title: RUBEANIC ACID AND ITS DERIVATIVES AS COLORIMETRIC REAGENTS. PART IV. NN'-DIBENZYL- AND NN'-DIPHENYLRUBEANIC ACIDS
author: J. XAVIER
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The .  use of  NN' -dibenzyl- and  NN' . diphenyl- rubanic acids as calorimetric reagents for certain elements of the transitional series is reported.  NN' -Dibenzylrabeanic acid gives metallic complexes almost similar to those of the parent compound, but with lower solubilities in common organic solvents. However, the aryl derivative ( NN' -diphenylrubeanic acid), though highly coloured, can be used with equal or even greater advantage than rubeallic acid itself for the colorimetric determination of copper, nickel, cobalt and palladium. The reagent has been found to be more sensitive than its parent compound or its alkyl analogues. For comparison, the behaviour of monothio-oxanilide towards various metallic cations has also been studied.
